content: The folder will be permanently deleted in 30 days.

comment.text: This is a sentence fragment displayed in a confirmation dialog when a user attempts to delete a folder. It informs the user about the permanent deletion timeline and is followed by a question asking if they want to continue.

usage.context: {{ name: selection[0]?.title }} to {{ trashSection: t("Common:TrashSection") }}. {" "} {!isThirdParty ? isFolder ? t("FolderDeletedAfter") : t("FileDeletedAfter") : null}{" "} {t("Common:WantToContinue")} );
